column1: World 19: The Fall of Silver Land

column6: Extreme 100% wants Amy & Lass' Spirit to be D10. The other two units can be whatever you need. By far one of the easier Core's to do
You will have a hard time trying to Full Auto. Just dodge the attacks & save Elesis T's attack for when Levianthan charges an attack.
Nepteon doesn't work? Reminder to manually walk to teleporters.
Magic Resistant Boss. If you have Descent Amy &/or Lass, you can probably just use Vice. Bruteforcing bosses via Powercreep
Be sure to destroy the pillars near the boss to stay alive. Not that hard of a boss anymore.
